data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding due date and request lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of due date and request lifecycle (open/fulfilled/declined/expired). However, the evidence provided does not include specific details or data points that confirm the existence of these lifecycle states for the requests. The linked use case mentions the need for these attributes but lacks concrete evidence, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of due date and request lifecycle states for the credential requests.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the due date and request lifecycle.
